benefits.description: Reactions go away after body gets used to the peptide; same batches used since July

side_effects.description: Allergic/MCAS reactions to CJC 1295/ipamorelin; reactions recur after taking a break or cycling off

protocol_notes: User takes an antihistamine (Zyrtec, Claritin, etc.) ~30 minutes before injection for the first week to manage reactions. Husband uses the same batches with no reaction. Reactions resolve after body adjusts but return after breaks/cycling off.
